title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 257.260 - Concessions to be reappraised each twenty years
text:
257.260.  Concessions to be reappraised each twenty years. — Assignments, leases or permissions by the board of trustees for periods of greater than twenty years, shall have the rates therefor reappraised or redetermined by the board every twenty years.
(L. 1959 S.B. 199 § 26)
